conflicts_and_gaps.details: Coil Color referenced in Matrix 2023 manual but no normalized shade records in Stage 12 section C.
conflicts_and_gaps.recommended_next_action: Add Coil Color to Stage 12 inventory and extract shades before activating line overrides.

conflicts_and_gaps.details: Super Sync listed in matrix.com navigation without dedicated product page or shade extraction.
conflicts_and_gaps.recommended_next_action: Catalog official Super Sync sources and add normalized shades to Stage 12.

conflicts_and_gaps.details: Tonal Control Pre-Bonded lacks normalized shade records in Stage 12 section C.
conflicts_and_gaps.recommended_next_action: Extract Tonal Control shades and line technical rules in a future batch.

conflicts_and_gaps.details: Matrix SoColor resistant gray developer strength: 20 vol in production DDL seed vs 30 vol in manufacturer educator materials.
conflicts_and_gaps.recommended_next_action: Reconcile against 2023 Matrix haircolor manual and update evidence_status.

conflicts_and_gaps.details: Pulp Riot FACTION8 permanent line has no Stage 13 line override group; covered only by universal direct-dye rule U009 for semi-permanent.
conflicts_and_gaps.recommended_next_action: Add FACTION8 override group when permanent formulation rules are scoped.

conflicts_and_gaps.details: Stage 13 rule_action keys (set_recommendation_status, block_reason) extend beyond current production engine apply_rule_action surface.
conflicts_and_gaps.recommended_next_action: Implement H_schema_extension_proposal actions in rule_evaluator or map at import.
